summary: Testing of designation field addition to customer registration flow. All tests passed - Backend: 9/9 tests (100%), Frontend: All features verified including form display, validation, and field acceptance.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Designation field has been fully tested and is working. The field is optional and appears between Company Name and Password fields in the registration form. Backend endpoints /api/auth/send-otp, /api/auth/verify-otp, /api/auth/login, and /api/auth/me all correctly handle the designation field.

DESIGNATION_UI.details: Designation field present in registration form with placeholder 'Designation (Optional)', correctly positioned between Company Name and Password fields

VERIFY_OTP_ACCEPTS_DESIGNATION.details: Schema accepts designation field (tested with invalid OTP to verify schema acceptance)

tests: Admin login returns designation field in user object
Customer login returns designation field in user object

AUTH_ME_RETURNS_DESIGNATION.details: /api/auth/me endpoint includes designation field in response - FIX APPLIED during testing

tests: Required fields still enforced - form won't submit with only designation filled
Form accepts all fields including optional designation

test_categories.TestLoginDesignation: 2/2 passed (admin and customer login return designation)

fixes_applied.description: Added 'designation' field to /api/auth/me endpoint response - was missing

rca_of_the_issue: N/A - Feature addition, not a bug fix
